tool_args.label: 2026 Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan

payload.title: 2026 Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan
payload.description: Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan for calendar year 2026 listing recurring, regular, and anticipated agenda items by month

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.
entity.organization is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organization names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

payload.description: Winter Trackwork Programs, Service Planning, 2025 Operations Year in Review

payload.description: Adopted/Financial Plan 2026, Winter Trackwork Programs, Service Planning, March Timetable

payload.description: Annual Elevator/Escalator Report, Spring Trackwork Programs, Diversity/EEO 4th Quarter 2025 Report

tool_args.label: April 2026 - Ridership Report and May Timetable

payload.description: 2025 Ridership Report, May Timetable, Track Work Programs

payload.description: Final Review of 2025 Operating Budget Results, Summer Service, Summer Track Work Programs

tool_args.label: June 2026 - Track Work Programs and Diversity/EEO Report

payload.description: Track Work Programs, Diversity/EEO 1st Quarter 2026 Report

payload.description: Mid-Year Operations Update, September Timetable, Track Work Programs

payload.description: 2027 Preliminary Budget (Public Comment), 2026 Mid-Year Forecast, Fall Track Work Programs, Diversity/EEO 2nd Quarter 2026 Report, Safety/Security Update

tool_args.label: October 2026 - Preliminary Budget and November Timetable

payload.description: 2027 Preliminary Budget (Public Comment), November Timetable, Fall Trackwork Programs

tool_args.label: November 2026 - Thanksgiving Holiday Service and Proposed 2027 Work Plan

payload.description: Thanksgiving Holiday Service, Winter Track Work Programs, Proposed 2027 Committee Work Plan

payload.claim_text: The Committee Chair will request a motion to approve the minutes of the prior month's meeting.
payload.subject: Approval of Minutes

payload.claim_text: The Work Plan will list, by month, the topics scheduled for review. The Committee will be advised if any changes have been made to the plan.
payload.subject: Work Plan

payload.claim_text: A Monthly report will be provided highlighting major accomplishments, safety, operations and progress on key initiatives and performance indicators.
payload.subject: President's Report

payload.claim_text: MTA Police will highlight the significant police activities incurred during the month reported.
payload.subject: MTA Police Report

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided that compares the Railroad's actual financial performance against its budget and/or forecast.
payload.subject: Finance Report

payload.claim_text: List of procurement action items requiring Board approval and items for Committee and Board information. The Non-Competitive items will be first, followed by the Competitive items and then the Ratifications. The list will include items that need a 2/3 vote of the Board for approval.
payload.subject: Procurements

payload.claim_text: The Key Performance Metrics book provides the MTA Board and members of the public with a comprehensive overview of monthly LIRR and Metro-North performance indicators including ridership, financial results, train performance, capital project progress, community events, and safety and security.
payload.subject: Key Performance Metric Report

payload.claim_text: The Committee will be advised of Agency plans to adjust schedules to support construction projects during the Winter of 2026.
payload.subject: Winter Track Work Programs

payload.claim_text: A review of the prior year's performance of railroad service will be provided to the Committee.
payload.subject: 2025 Operations Year in Review

tool_args.label: Fall Track Work Programs - Main Line Second Track and East Side Access

payload.claim_text: This is to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plans to adjust schedules to support various trackwork programs, Main Line Second Track construction and East Side Access Readiness projects.
payload.subject: Fall Track Work Programs

tool_args.label: Winter Track Work - Switch Installations in West Side Yard

payload.claim_text: This is to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plan to temporarily adjust schedules for a series of Switch Installations in West Side Yard.
payload.subject: Winter Track Work Programs - Switch Installations

payload.claim_text: The Agency will present its revised 2026 Financial Plan. These plans will reflect the 2026 Adopted Budget and an updated Financial Plan for 2026 reflecting the out-year impact of any changes incorporated into the 2026 Adopted Budget.
payload.subject: Adopted/Financial Plan 2026

payload.claim_text: Annual report to the Committee on system-wide availability for elevators and escalators throughout the system.
payload.subject: Annual Elevator/Escalator Report

tool_args.label: March Timetable and Winter Track Work Programs

payload.claim_text: The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules. The Committee will be advised of Agency plans to adjust schedules to support construction projects during the Winter of 2026.
payload.subject: March Timetable / Winter Track Work Programs

payload.claim_text: A report will be presented to the Committee on Agency ridership trends during 2025 based on monthly ticket sales data and the results of train ridership counts conducted by the Agency.
payload.subject: 2025 Ridership Report

tool_args.label: Final Review of 2025 Operating Budget Results

payload.claim_text: A review of the prior year's budget results and their implications for current and future budget performance will be presented to the Committee.
payload.subject: Final Review of 2025 Operating Budget Results

payload.claim_text: The Committee will be advised of Agency key operating performance metrics and indicators for the first half of 2026.
payload.subject: Mid-Year Operations Update

payload.claim_text: Public comment will be accepted on the 2027 Budget.
payload.subject: 2027 Preliminary Budget

payload.claim_text: The agency will provide the 2026 Mid-Year Forecast financial information for revenue and expense by month.
payload.subject: 2026 Mid-Year Forecast

payload.claim_text: The Committee will recommend action to the Board on the Final Proposed Budget for 2026.
payload.subject: 2027 Final Proposed Budget

payload.claim_text: The Committee will approve the Proposed Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan for 2027 that will address initiatives to be reported on throughout the year.
payload.subject: Approval of 2027 Committee Work Plan

payload.claim_text: Annual review of Long Island Committee Charter for Committee revision/approval.
payload.subject: Review Committee Charter

tool_args.label: MTA published 2026 LIRR Committee Work Plan

payload.description: The Metropolitan Transportation Authority published the 2026 Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan

tool_args.label: LIRR is subject of Committee Work Plan

payload.description: The 2026 Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan covers agenda items for the MTA Long Island Rail Road Committee
